query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A grid of rectangular panes viewed from below against a backdrop of turbulent sky, the dark framework forming a regular lattice structure through which billowing clouds are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A dim, oppressive grid of rectangular panes viewed from below against a turbulent sky blurred by rain or condensation, the dark framework pressing inward with a suffocating weight; the muted, washed-out tones and obscured clarity evoke isolation and unease behind the barrier.
